creator: carpetsmoker@xs4all.nl
text:
Update audio/csound to 5.06

Schedule audio/csound-manual for deletion, the HTML docs and tutorial
are now installed by the csound port, additional PDF docs can be downloaded
from the website.

csound has been "liberated" and is now GPL, see http://csounds.com/VercoeGift.html
The corresponding csound entry in LEGAL should be removed, note that
csound-manual isn't updated to 5.06 and is still subject to a restrictive
license.

With thanks to Erik Trulsson and Mel at -questions for patch-Top-csound.c
